_doc: Astute employee role registry — drives VQ buyer-resolution fallback. Maintained by operator (Jake Harris). The vq-loading-agent (and any downstream consumer needing the buyer/role distinction) checks an ad_user_id against this registry. If a candidate is in `buyers`, assign as chuboe_buyer_id. If in `support`, do NOT use as buyer — fall through to RFQ-owner (chuboe_rfq.chuboe_user_id) or escalate. Anyone in neither list → escalate to Jake for review.
_source: session with operator 2026-05-20; confirmed via interactive review of last-10-days VQ loaders.

fallback_policy.candidate_in_support: DO NOT use as buyer; fall through to RFQ owner (chuboe_rfq.chuboe_user_id), else escalate clarify_buyer
fallback_policy.candidate_in_neither: escalate clarify_buyer to operator (Jake Harris) with chain candidates listed
